## User-Facing Change

- What changed for users?
- Which pages, tools, workflows, widgets, or API responses are affected?

## AI / Privacy Impact

- [ ] No AI behavior changed
- [ ] Deterministic routing changed
- [ ] Optional model-assisted behavior changed
- [ ] Consent copy or consent flow changed
- [ ] Sensitive data handling changed

Notes:

## Source / Data Impact

- [ ] No source/data behavior changed
- [ ] Source confidence or freshness UI changed
- [ ] Tool formulas, rates, rules, fees, scholarships, fuel, FX, tax, country, or import-duty data changed
- [ ] Generated data files changed

Notes:
